| Role | Path | Read/Write |

| Source (READ-ONLY) | `C:/Users/drhab/OneDrive/Desktop/minasaati-last-latest-minasa/frontend` | never written |
| Ported destination | `C:/Users/drhab/OneDrive/Desktop/new-minasaati/frontend` | write target only |

Both roots are distinct (different parent folder names: `new-minasaati` vs `minasaati-last-latest-minasa`).

---

## Mount-point decision

The migration charter §2 names the target frontend mount point as
`C:/Users/drhab/OneDrive/Desktop/new-minasaati/frontend/`. The target
already hosts a near-feature-complete Next.js 16.2.4 app at that path,
and the charter §4-§5 forbids blind overwrites. Therefore the port
strategy is **selective merge** (source content is added/reconciled
inside the existing `frontend/`, with target-only files preserved):

- **Replaced / reconciled** by the port: every source file (the source
  tree is a strict subset of the target's current tree).
- **Preserved** target-only: `middleware.ts`, `lib/`, `services/`,
  `store/`, `types/`, `next-env.d.ts`, `app/components/providers/`,
  `app/comprehensive-exams/`, `app/admin/courses/[id]/comprehensive-exams/`,
  `.env.local`.
- **Never copied** (build artifacts): `node_modules/`, `.next/`,
  `test-results/`, `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`.

---

## File-count verification (excludes `node_modules`, `.next`, `test-results`, `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---:|
| Source files | **76** |
| Target files (after port) | **89** |
| Missing in target | **0** |
| Source files with different content in target | **0** (byte-identical via MD5) |
| Target-only preserved files (per charter) | **13** |
| Source-only files | **0** |

The source tree is a strict subset of the target tree: every source
file is present in the target with byte-identical content; the target
adds 13 files of its own (security middleware, comprehensive-exams
route, axios/firebase services, auth provider, types — all of which
the charter §4-§5 requires us to keep).

**Conclusion:** the port is complete. No files were overwritten on
the source side; the target was selectively merged.

## Status

**PORTED** — the old frontend has been inventoried and is fully
present inside the target project. All 76 source files exist in the
target with byte-identical content (verified by per-file MD5). The
13 target-only files (security middleware, comprehensive-exams
route, axios/firebase services, auth store, types, providers,
`.env.local`) were preserved per the charter's §4-§5 selective-
replacement constraint.
